Class Weapon

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.items.Weapon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Item
public final class Weapon extends Object implements Item
Represents a weapon item that allows the hero to deal damage.

The base statistics for weapons (damage, rarity, shape) are loaded dynamically from a JSON registry file. Weapons can be rotated, leveled up, and can be subjected to curse mechanics.

  • Constructor Details

    • Weapon

      public Weapon(WeaponName weaponName, int level)
      Creates a weapon using its specific name and initial level. * @param weaponName the name of the weapon to instantiate.
      Parameters:
      level - the initial level of the weapon.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if level is negative or if the weapon name is not in the registry.

  • Method Details

    • weaponType

      public WeaponType weaponType()
      Gets the type of the weapon (e.g., MELEE, RANGED, MAGIC).
      Returns:
      The weapon type.

    • buff

      public static void buff(Weapon w1, Weapon w2)
      Increases damage if two weapons share the same type or rarity.

      This mechanism is used to apply adjacency bonuses when weapons are placed next to each other in the backpack.

      * @param w1 the first weapon (will get the bonus damage).
      Parameters:
      w2 - the second weapon (provides the context for the bonus).

    • rotate

      public Item rotate()
      Rotates the weapon by 90 degrees clockwise.
      Specified by:
      rotate in interface Item
      Returns:
      the weapon itself (fluent interface).

    • levelUp

      public void levelUp()
      Increases the level of the weapon by 1.

    • size

      public List<Coordinate> size()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the list of coordinates (shape) the item occupies in the inventory grid. This shape changes based on the item's rotation.
      Specified by:
      size in interface Item
      Returns:
      a list of coordinates relative to the item's anchor (0,0).

    • rarity

      public Rarity rarity()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the rarity of the item (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Relic).
      Specified by:
      rarity in interface Item
      Returns:
      the item's rarity.

    • cost

      public Cost cost()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the resource cost to use or equip the item. This can be Energy, Mana, or Gold.
      Specified by:
      cost in interface Item
      Returns:
      the cost object.

    • isCursed

      public boolean isCursed()
      Checks if the weapon is currently cursed.
      Specified by:
      isCursed in interface Item
      Returns:
      true if cursed, false otherwise.

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the name of the item.
      Specified by:
      name in interface Item
      Returns:
      the name as a String.

    • id

      public UUID id()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the unique identifier of the item instance. Useful for distinguishing identical items.
      Specified by:
      id in interface Item
      Returns:
      the UUID.

    • rotation

      public int rotation()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the current rotation state index (0, 1, 2, or 3). 0 = 0°, 1 = 90°, 2 = 180°, 3 = 270°.
      Specified by:
      rotation in interface Item
      Returns:
      the rotation index.

    • damage

      public int damage()
      Gets the current base damage of the weapon.
      Returns:
      the damage value.

    • createRandom

      public static Weapon createRandom(WeaponType type, int level)
      Creates a random weapon using weighted probabilities for rarity. * @param type the type of weapon (Melee, Ranged, etc.) to generate.
      Parameters:
      level - the level of the weapon.
      Returns:
      a new random Weapon instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if type is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if level is negative.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • becomeCursed

      public Item becomeCursed()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Applies a curse to the item.
      Specified by:
      becomeCursed in interface Item
      Returns:
      the item itself (modified) or a new cursed instance.

    • removeCursed

      public Item removeCursed()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Removes the curse from the item.
      Specified by:
      removeCursed in interface Item
      Returns:
      the item itself (modified) or a new uncursed instance.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
